title: Cost of accounting
doc_html:
Art. 4398.  Cost of accounting

Accounts filed by a tutor are at the expense of the minor, except that an account filed by a tutor who has been removed or an account not filed timely is at the expense of the tutor.
doc_text:
Art. 4398.  Cost of accounting
Accounts filed by a tutor are at the expense of the minor, except that an account filed by a tutor who has been removed or an account not filed timely is at the expense of the tutor.
